name: fortify-skills
description: OpenText Fortify AppSec skills. Use for SAST/DAST/SCA scanning, vulnerability triage, audit workflows, CI/CD pipeline integration, and FCLI commands. Supports Fortify on Demand (FoD) and Software Security Center (SSC).

interface.shortDescription: AppSec skills for SAST/DAST/SCA scanning, vulnerability triage, CI/CD integration, and FCLI.
interface.longDescription: OpenText Fortify AppSec skills that teach Codex how to use Fortify effectively — covering SAST/DAST/SCA scanning, vulnerability triage, audit workflows, CI/CD pipeline integration, and FCLI commands. Supports Fortify on Demand (FoD) and Software Security Center (SSC).
defaultPrompt: Show me all critical and high severity issues in my application
Add Fortify SAST scanning to my CI/CD pipeline
Fix the SQL Injection findings in my codebase
